name: Raydium Watch Agent
description: Raydium pool watcher and quote/mock adapter template for liquidity, volume, and pair flow alerts before gated execution work.
degenPitch: Watch pools first. Touch live execution only after the adapter earns it.
whatItDoes: Watches Raydium-style pool activity and liquidity changes.
Emits paid alerts and route-intent previews.
Keeps live Raydium execution mocked or gated until adapter tests exist.
cursorPrompt: Build a Raydium Watch Agent with DNA x402. Watch pool activity, sell receipt-gated alerts, create mock/gated route intents, and do not submit live Raydium trades without adapter gate and client signature.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Raydium Watch Agent with DNA x402. Watch pool activity, sell receipt-gated alerts, create mock/gated route intents, and do not submit live Raydium trades without adapter gate and client signature.
receiptProofBehavior: No ungated live submit path is exposed.
